glosses.en: female civil servant; female public official
glosses.zh-Hans: 女公务员; 女公职人员
glosses.yue: 女公務員; 女公職人員
glosses.vi: nữ công chức; nữ viên chức
glosses.id: pegawai negeri perempuan; pegawai negeri sipil perempuan
glosses.ja: 女性公務員; 女性役人

sentences.target: Die Beamtin hilft mir am Schalter.

translations.de: Die Beamtin hilft mir am Schalter.
translations.en: The official helps me at the counter.
translations.es: La funcionaria me ayuda en la ventanilla.
translations.yue: 有位職員喺櫃枱幫緊我。
translations.pt: A funcionária me ajuda no balcão.
translations.vi: Nhân viên đang giúp tôi tại quầy.
translations.nl: De medewerkster helpt me bij het loket.
translations.hu: Az ügyintéző segít nekem az ablaknál.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर कर्मचारी मेरी मदद कर रही है.
translations.el: Η υπάλληλος με βοηθά στο γκισέ.
translations.ja: 窓口で職員が私を手伝ってくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite verb, present, 3rd person singular; governs a dative object.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object of 'hilft'.
Preposition 'an' contracted with article 'dem' (an+dem); locative; selects dative.
Common noun; masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'am'; location.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Beamtin nach dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː bəˈʔamtɪn naːx deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯./

translations.de: Ich frage die Beamtin nach dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː bəˈʔamtɪn naːx deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯./
translations.en: I ask the official about the form.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la funcionaria sobre el formulario.
translations.fr: Je demande à la fonctionnaire au sujet du formulaire.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向工作人员询问表格的事。
translations.yue: 我問職員關於表格嘅事。
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у сотрудницы про бланк.
translations.pt: Pergunto à funcionária sobre o formulário.
translations.he: אני שואל את הפקידה לגבי הטופס.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi nhân viên về mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de medewerkster naar het formulier.
translations.hi: मैं कर्मचारी से फॉर्म के बारे में पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω την υπάλληλο για το έντυπο.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada petugas tentang formulir.
translations.ja: 窓口の職員に用紙について聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and a PP with 'nach'.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'frage'.
Preposition; selects dative; with 'fragen' expresses the topic ('about').
Definite article; neuter singular dative; modifies 'Formular' after 'nach'.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist Beamtin in Berlin.

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Beamtin in Berlin.
translations.en: My sister is a civil servant in Berlin.
translations.es: Mi hermana es funcionaria en Berlín.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est fonctionnaire à Berlin.
translations.it: Mia sorella è funzionaria a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹在柏林当公务员。
translations.yue: 我妹妹喺柏林做公務員。
translations.pt: Minha irmã é funcionária pública em Berlim.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim Berlin'de memur olarak çalışıyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi là công chức ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is ambtenaar in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Моя сестра — державна службовиця в Берліні.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन बर्लिन में सरकारी कर्मचारी है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest urzędniczką w Berlinie.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι δημόσια υπάλληλος στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er offentlig ansatt i Berlin.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya adalah pegawai negeri di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min syster är tjänsteman i Berlin.
translations.ro: Sora mea este funcționară publică în Berlin.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je úřednice v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min søster er offentligt ansat i Berlin.
translations.ja: 私の妹はベルリンで公務員をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary; present, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; predicate nominal (profession).
Preposition; locative; in static contexts selects dative; forms a PP indicating location.
Proper noun; city name; object of the preposition 'in' (no article).

sentences.target: Die Beamtin prüft meinen Antrag heute.

translations.de: Die Beamtin prüft meinen Antrag heute.
translations.en: The official is checking my application today.
translations.es: La funcionaria revisa hoy mi solicitud.
translations.fr: La fonctionnaire examine ma demande aujourd'hui.
translations.it: L'impiegata esamina oggi la mia domanda.
translations.zh-Hans: 工作人员今天在审核我的申请。
translations.yue: 今日職員會審核我嘅申請。
translations.pt: A funcionária analisa hoje minha solicitação.
translations.he: הפקידה בודקת את הבקשה שלי היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nhân viên đang kiểm tra hồ sơ của tôi.
translations.nl: De medewerkster controleert vandaag mijn aanvraag.
translations.hu: Az ügyintéző ma átnézi a kérelmemet.
translations.hi: कर्मचारी आज मेरे आवेदन की जाँच कर रही है.
translations.el: Η υπάλληλος ελέγχει σήμερα την αίτησή μου.
translations.nb: Saksbehandleren går gjennom søknaden min i dag.
translations.id: Petugas sedang memeriksa permohonan saya hari ini.
translations.sv: Handläggaren går igenom min ansökan i dag.
translations.da: Medarbejderen gennemgår min ansøgning i dag.
translations.ja: 職員は今日私の申請を確認しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite verb, present, 3rd person singular; transitive; selects an accusative object.
Possessive determiner; masculine singular accusative; modifies 'Antrag'.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'prüft'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the finite verb to indicate time.
